{
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Excelsior;

public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> EmailColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder,
        System.Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Email, configuration);

    public static void EmailHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, System.Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, System.Action<TStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, System.Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Email);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> AgeColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder,
        System.Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Employee, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Age, configuration);

    public static void AgeHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, System.Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, System.Action<TStyle, global::Employee, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, System.Func<global::Employee, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Age);
}

}
